title: Nile Pantheon
editorialSummary: Egyptian gods grouped by their primary domain: sky/sun gods, gods of the dead and afterlife, gods of knowledge and magic, and goddess figures associated with protection and motherhood. Each group of four is textbook Egyptology.

meta.gptRationale: Egyptian gods are recognizable in broad strokes, but sorting many lesser-known names into precise domains is one of the harder tasks in this tier.
